hook: A funny game you play with your wife.
Skip your push-ups. Fund her bubble tea.
Skip today. Meet the final boss tomorrow.
warning: Do NOT show this app to your spouse… unless you're serious about building habits.
This app gives your partner a dangerous amount of power. Use responsibly.
Warning: your excuses are about to meet their final boss.
warning_ack: Interesting choice… your excuses have been notified. 😈
Bold. Your partner is going to love this.
invite_sent: There is no turning back now. 😈
Your final boss has entered the game.
Your wife has entered the game.
dashboard: Your streak is alive. Keep it that way.
Your streak survived yesterday. Don't make it regret trusting you.
watcher: Waiting patiently for a skip day. 🍿
Financially invested in the streak breaking. 💸
success: Streak protected. Your partner earned nothing today. Everyone wins.
Nice. Your wallet lives to fight another day.
Done. Your partner is mildly disappointed. 😏
skip: Tough day. Your partner just won this round. 🏆

It happens. The streak resets — the fun doesn't.
lazy_tax_raised: Bold move by your final boss.
share_owed: My wife discovered passive income. Unfortunately, it's my laziness.
share_clean: Make your partner regret that lazy day.
